novelty: Curated top 10 most impactful findings with full statistics

findings.title: Severity-Sex Gradient
findings.finding: Fatal AEs 75.4%F → Mild 52.3%F; per-drug rho positive in 67.2% of drugs

findings.title: Within-Class 90pp Spread
findings.stat: p=1e-81 (Fisher exact); also CGRP 74pp, CCB 59pp, beta-blocker 48pp

findings.title: 50% AE Reversibility
findings.finding: Over 2,500 AEs flip sex-bias direction depending on which drug causes them
findings.stat: 50.6% of AEs are drug-determined, not AE-intrinsic

findings.title: Clinical Trial Gap
findings.finding: 452/466 drugs with strong sex-bias have ZERO sex-stratified trials

findings.title: GLP-1 RA Paradox
findings.finding: GLP-1 RAs 23.6%F male-biased despite treating obesity (>60%F); Tirzepatide 8.4%F

findings.title: CPI Immune AEs 100%F
findings.finding: All immune-mediated checkpoint inhibitor AEs exclusively female-biased
findings.stat: Hepatotox, colitis, pneumonitis, myocarditis — all 100%F across 4 CPIs

findings.title: Geographic 60pp Variation
findings.stat: Up to 60pp drug-level variation by reporter country

findings.title: Annual Temporal Decline
findings.stat: rho=-0.829, p=2.5e-4; COVID drop to 56.8% in 2021
